_meta.description: Navigate to YeshID organization settings and capture current configuration: org name, domain, SCIM settings, seat count, and plan information.
_meta.author: session-2026-04-14
anomalies: Settings path is likely /organization/settings or /settings — try both if first returns 404
May require admin role — standard users may see a 403 or redirect
Plan/billing info may be on a separate /billing or /subscription subpath

chain.note: Navigate to org settings. Primary path attempt.
Perceive org settings page. Capture: org name, domain(s), SCIM base URL, API tokens, seat limit, plan tier. If page shows 404/403, try /settings or /admin/settings.
ENABLE if /organization/settings is a redirect — try the general subpath directly.
Perceive general settings subpage if navigated here.
